html:
Exclusive to:

The Sea Chest is a craftable Structure introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Structures Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 4 Boards and 1 Tar to craft. It works similar to a regular Chest, but can only be placed on the Ocean.

Because Krampus cannot spawn in the sea, he cannot break or steal items from Sea Chests.

Trivia

  • The Sea Chest was added to Shipwrecked more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
  • The Sea Chest shares its appearance with the Octopus Chest.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Watertight, just like all my theories.”
–Wilson
“I keep all my best stuff in there.”
–Willow
“Is for holding seastuff!”
–Wolfgang
“Treasures suspended over the bottomless abyss.”
–Wendy
“KEEPS STUFF AWAY FROM THE CRUMMY OCEAN”
–WX-78
“A buoy I repurposed as a storage device.”
–Wickerbottom
“How's it stay afloat when it's full?”
–Woodie
“My suits had best not get moldy in there.”
–Maxwell
“Buoyant storage! This will revolutionize sea-going affairs!”
–Wagstaff
“Spares my effects fröm the sea's dark depths.”
–Wigfrid
“We could keep our bath toys in it!”
–Webber
“Now I don't need to swim back to shore for my stuff.”
–Walani
“I probably shouldn't keep perishables in it.”
–Warly
“Woodlegs' treasure, buried at sea!”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA STUFFS CONTAINETH WITHIN”
–Wilba
“Swimming stuff!”
–Wormwood
“Waterborne storage.”
–Wheeler
The Sea Chest is a craftable Structure introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Structures Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 4 Boards and 1 Tar to craft. It works similar to a regular Chest, but can only be placed on the Ocean.
Because Krampus cannot spawn in the sea, he cannot break or steal items from Sea Chests.

The Sea Chest was added to Shipwrecked more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
The Sea Chest shares its appearance with the Octopus Chest.

The '''Sea Chest''' is a craftable [[Structure]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Structures Tab]], requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and 4 [[Boards]] and 1 [[Tar]] to craft. It works similar to a regular [[Chest]], but can only be placed on the [[Ocean]].

Because [[Krampus]] cannot spawn in the sea, he cannot break or steal items from Sea Chests.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Sea Chest was added to ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
* The Sea Chest shares its appearance with the [[Octopus Chest]].
